home_intro: Change a few parameters and watch the motion respond. Every tool uses the same controls, visualizer, and live measurements.
edit_hint: The visualizer updates immediately as you edit a value.
spring_description: Explore how amplitude, frequency, damping, and physical properties shape an oscillation.
parabola_description: Launch a projectile using an angle, velocity components, or time to its apex.
linear_description: Describe constant-velocity motion directly or by two positions and elapsed time.
circular_description: Describe rotation using angular velocity, period, or tangential velocity.
use_climb_time: Use horizontal velocity and climb time.
use_initial_velocity: Use initial position and signed velocity.
use_positions_time: Use start, end, and travel time.
use_path_speed: Use speed along the circular path.
hint_amplitude: Maximum displacement from the equilibrium position.
hint_stiffness: Restoring force per unit extension of the spring.
hint_damping: Exponential decay rate; zero means no damping.
hint_mass: A larger mass produces a lower natural frequency.
hint_angular_frequency: Angular rate of oscillation in radians per second.
hint_period_cycle: Time required for one complete oscillation.
hint_initial_speed: Magnitude of the initial velocity vector.
hint_launch_angle: Angle of the initial velocity above the horizontal.
hint_gravity: Constant downward acceleration during the flight.
hint_start_height: Vertical position at the instant of launch.
hint_initial_vx: Horizontal component of the initial velocity.
hint_initial_vy: Vertical component of the initial velocity.
hint_apex_time: Time until the vertical velocity becomes zero.
hint_velocity_signed: Velocity is positive to the right and negative to the left.
hint_end_position: Position at the specified final time.
hint_travel_time: Time interval between the initial and final positions.
hint_radius: Distance from the centre of the circular path to the object.
hint_start_angle: Initial angular position measured from the positive x-axis.
hint_angular_velocity: Positive values rotate counterclockwise; negative values rotate clockwise.
hint_orbital_period: Time required for one complete revolution.
hint_tangential_velocity: Signed velocity tangent to the circular path.
